name: AI Writing Assistant
author: Notesaner
description: LLM-powered writing assistance with note summarization, continue writing, rewrite selection, grammar check, translation, link suggestions, and auto-tagging. Supports OpenAI, Anthropic, and local Ollama.

provider.description: LLM provider to use for AI features

apiKey.description: API key for the selected provider (not required for Ollama)

model.description: Model identifier to use (e.g. gpt-4o-mini, claude-3-5-haiku-20241022, llama3.2)

maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens to generate per request

customEndpoint.description: Custom API endpoint URL (for Ollama or OpenAI-compatible providers)
